titleStmt.title: SII 40.154: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 154. (A.R. No. B. 288 of 1931.) Aḍigoppula, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab planted near a well called Goṭṭapallivaribhāvi in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1796, Bhāva, Chaitra, ba. 13, Tuesday.

Registers the construction of a drinking water (maṁchi-nīḷḷa) well to the west of Aḍigoppula by a resident of the village named Veṅkayya-Nāyuḍu, son of Veṅgaḷappa Nāyuḍu and grandson of Guṭlapalli Gaṅga-Nāyuḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatsani vijayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbbulu
1796 Agunēṭi bhāva nāma
saṁvvatsara caitra ba 13 Aṁ
gāraka vāraṁ rōjuna Aḍigo
ppala kāparastuṁḍuṁnnu
Aṁ la gōtrōdbhavulaina
guṭlata lli gaṁgānāyuṁḍuṁnnu putruḍaina
veṁggaḷappanāyuḍu putruṁḍunnu pautru
ḍaina veṁkayyanāyuḍuṁnnu . vūriki paḍa
maragā bhagavatārpitamugā
maṁccinīḷla bhāvi pratiṣṭa cā
yaḍamainadi yavaru Ayni
bhāviki vicchinnaṁ teccina pakṣamaṁ
du kāśilō gōhatya cēśni pā
pāna poṁdduduru .
svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupā
lanaṁ paradattāpahārēṇa svadattā niṣphalaṁ
bhavēt . kōnūri yīśvaraliṁgaṁ
vrālū .
Digital edition of SII 40.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
